articles.title: Heatwave Claims Life Of Revenue Inspector In Dhenkanal - Ommcom News
articles.full_text:
Dhenkanal: In a tragic incident, Chaitanya Dehuri (35), a Revenue Inspector posted in Gandia Tahasil, reportedly died due to extreme heatwave conditions.
Dehuri, a resident of Maruabil village under Kankadahada block in Dhenkanal district, was earlier working as an Amin in Bhuban Tahasil. He had recently been promoted and joined as Revenue Inspector in Gandia.
According to sources, Dehuri was living in a rented house in Bhuban. He fell seriously ill due to the intense summer heat and heavy workload. He was immediately rushed to Bhuban Government Hospital, where doctors declared him dead on arrival.
Bhuban Police have seized the body and launched an investigation into the matter. The exact cause of death has not been ascertained yet. Officials said the actual reason behind the death will only be confirmed after the postmortem report is available.
The untimely death of the young officer has cast a pall of gloom over the Revenue Department and the local area.

articles.title: Odisha Revenue Officer Chaitanya Dehury Dies of Suspected Heatstroke at Home - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
In a tragic and deeply shocking incident, a 45-year-old Revenue Inspector (RI) working in Dhenkanal district has lost his life due to suspected heatstroke! The sudden death of the government officer inside his rented residence has sent shockwaves across the entire district administrative department.
The deceased officer, identified as Chaitanya Dehury, was working as the Revenue Inspector in the Gondia Tehsil circle under Dhenkanal district. According to local sources, Dehury began feeling extremely uneasy and sick due to severe heat and humidity inside his rented house in Bhuban Ward No. 5. In a desperate attempt to get fresh air, his wife, Pramodini Dehury, was assisting him out of the house when he suddenly collapsed and lost consciousness. He was immediately rushed to the Bhuban Community Health Centre (CHC), where the attending doctors tragically declared him brought dead. Upon receiving the news, the Bhuban Police reached the spot, recovered the body, and sent it for a post-mortem examination to determine the official cause of death.
